content_blocks.hs_subtext: Granite PM Academy's PMP Certification Training in {city_state} prepares you to pass the Project Management Professional exam. Our four-day live-virtual course is taught by active certified practitioners and satisfies PMI's 35 education hour requirement.

content_blocks.fc_heading: Why {city} Project Managers Choose Granite PM Academy

fq_items.question: Do I need to travel to {city} for this training?
fq_items.answer: No. All of our PMP training is delivered live-virtual via video conference, so {city} professionals attend from wherever they work. No commuting or hotel required.

fq_items.question: What are the PMP eligibility requirements?
fq_items.answer: PMI requires either a four-year degree with 36 months of project leadership experience, or a high school diploma with 60 months of experience. All applicants need 35 contact hours of PM education — our course satisfies this requirement.

fq_items.question: How long does it take to get PMP certified in {city}?
fq_items.answer: After completing training, PMI typically approves applications within 5–10 business days. Once approved, you have one year to sit for the exam. Most students study 4–8 weeks after the course before scheduling their exam.

fq_items.question: What is your pass guarantee?
fq_items.answer: If you complete our course and do not pass the PMP exam within 90 days, we provide additional coaching sessions at no additional cost until you pass.

fq_items.question: Is this training PMI-approved?
fq_items.answer: Yes. Granite PM Academy is a PMI Premier Authorized Training Partner (ATP). Our curriculum is aligned to PMI's current Examination Content Outline and our contact hours are fully accepted by PMI.

content_blocks.hs_subtext: Granite PM Academy's CAPM Certification Training in {city_state} prepares you to earn the Certified Associate in Project Management credential. Our three-day live-virtual course satisfies PMI's 23 contact hour requirement and is ideal for professionals launching or transitioning into project management.

fq_items.question: Do I need project management experience to take the CAPM?
fq_items.answer: No prior PM experience is required. The CAPM only requires secondary education (high school diploma or equivalent) and 23 contact hours of project management education — which our course fulfills.

fq_items.question: Is the CAPM a good starting credential for {city} professionals?
fq_items.answer: Yes. The CAPM is one of the most recognized entry-level PM credentials and is highly regarded across industries in {city_state}. It demonstrates PM knowledge to employers even before you have years of experience.

fq_items.question: How does the CAPM differ from the PMP?
fq_items.answer: The PMP requires 36–60 months of project leadership experience; the CAPM does not. Many professionals earn the CAPM early in their career, gain experience, then pursue the PMP.

fq_items.question: Is this training delivered online?
fq_items.answer: Yes. Our CAPM training is fully live-virtual — no travel required. {city} students attend via video conference from wherever they are.

content_blocks.cb_subtext: The CAPM is the credential that opens doors. Earn it with Granite PM Academy from the comfort of your home or office in {city_state}.
